data.title: Gen Z Most Likely to Believe Revival Is Coming to America, New Data Shows
data.description: In Boulder, Colorado, recent research revealed by Barna Group and Gloo for the 2026 State of the Church initiative shows an increasing number of Americans expressing hope for a spiritual revival. Findings from a February 2026 survey indicate that almost 29% of U.S. adults are optimistic about the possibility of a spiritual revival, with Generation Z displaying the highest anticipation at 38%. Researchers highlight that this belief in potential spiritual transformation indicates a significant trend.

data.title: "New: NVIDIA CloudXR 6.0 offers 4K streaming to Apple Vision Pro with foveated rendering, and web access to Meta Quest 3."
data.description: CloudXR 6.0 from NVIDIA now allows for the streaming of 4K spatial computing content to Apple Vision Pro through foveated rendering. Additionally, it offers zero-install web access to Meta Quest 3.

data.title: Inc. Names Horatio No. 74 on Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Southeast
data.description: In Miami on March 31, 2026, the renowned media brand Inc. announced that Horatio, a cutting-edge outsourcing firm transforming customer experience and operations, has secured the 74th position on the 2026 Inc. list. This ranking showcases Horatio's significant impact and success in the entrepreneurial and business landscape.

data.title: Will Bitcoin's Four-Year Cycle Persist As Institutional Influence Grows?
data.description: The recent stagnant movement of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) within a narrow trading range is sparking discussions about the continuation or potential fading of its traditional four-year cycle, with the debate intensifying in a recent post by Arkham Intelligence on March 31. The analytics platform pointed out the increasing institutional participation in the market, suggesting that this could be altering Bitcoin's market dynamics. Institutional investors tend to invest in a more organized manner, following set schedules and risk management strategies, which could lead to decreased volatility and a smoothing out of the typical boom-and-bust cycles seen in Bitcoin's history. This shift is attributed to factors like increased institutional involvement and potential impacts of macroeconomic conditions on the market. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel - On March 31, 2026, Meitav Investment House (TASE: MTAV) disclosed an update following their previous immediate report from March 2, 2026 (Reference No. 2026-01-019142). The recent announcement pertains to the implementation of a monthly reporting system for specific business operations.

data.title: Tether's USAT stablecoin for the U.S. market expands to Celo network with Google Cloud, beyond Ethereum Mainnet.
data.description: The USAT stablecoin supported by Tether and designed for the United States market has now broadened its reach to the Ethereum layer-2 network Celo in collaboration with Google Cloud.

data.title: Towson University and Follett Higher Education announce the opening of reimagined UStore
data.description: A redesigned UStore is set to open on March 24 at Towson University, in partnership with Follett Higher Education. The campus store will feature a wider selection of merchandise, improved access to course materials, and a more modern retail environment. The initiative aims to enhance the overall shopping experience for students and faculty members. The new UStore launch is a part of the ongoing efforts to provide better services at Towson University and is taking place simultaneously in Towson, Maryland, and Westchester, Illinois.

data.title: Slash Your Wegovy Costs: Novo Nordisk Reveals First-Ever Subscription Plan
data.description: Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE: NVO) has announced a new multi-month subscription program for its obesity treatment, Wegovy (semaglutide), to offer more predictable pricing for self-pay patients and enhance long-term adherence. The U.S. FDA recently approved a higher-dose version of Wegovy, known as Wegovy HD (semaglutide) injection 7.2 mg, expanding the treatment options for adults with obesity who require further weight reduction after tolerating the current 2.4 mg dose. The program was launched on March 31, 2026, enabling eligible patients to access the FDA-approved treatment through specific telehealth providers at a fixed monthly rate. Novo Nordisk has introduced a tiered pricing structure for Wegovy, with lower monthly costs for patients committing to longer subscription periods, offering potential annual savings. This initiative aims to address cost barriers and increase accessibility to Wegovy for individuals struggling with obesity.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- DERMAFLASH/
data.description: DERMAFLASH has recently introduced a cutting-edge dermaplaning system designed exclusively for skincare professionals. The system is powered by sound technology and is the first of its kind in the industry. In a news release issued on 30-Mar-2026, the company corrected an error in the previously stated Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), which should in fact be $295 and not the earlier stated $175. This correction was made to ensure accurate information is provided to consumers.

data.title: Oracle Reportedly Begins Cutting Thousands Of Jobs Amid Big AI Spending Push
data.description: The stock of Oracle has seen a significant downturn, primarily due to its heavy investment in AI cloud expansion impacting cash flow. Reports indicate that Oracle has initiated job cuts, affecting thousands of employees, as a result of this substantial investment in AI technology.
